nodes.label: HiseEvent (Note-On)
nodes.description: Note-on event provides the event ID for storage lookup

nodes.label: Store Event ID
nodes.description: Captures event ID per voice on note-on

nodes.label: Static Mode
nodes.description: Static=On: read once at note-on. Static=Off: read continuously.

nodes.label: SlotIndex
nodes.description: Selects which data slot (0-15) to read

nodes.label: Static
nodes.description: Toggle: read once at note-on (On) or continuously (Off)

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Outputs the read value as normalised modulation signal
